title: Canadian household income, wages, and saving
description: Household income includes broader income and transfers; average wages describe employed workers. Quarterly values remain at their native frequency and are latest-vintage revised data.
plainLanguageSummary: Household income includes broader income and transfers; average wages describe employed workers. Quarterly values remain at their native frequency and are latest-vintage revised data.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Published indices and explicitly labelled derived changes; no interpolation across native frequencies.
calculation.explanation: Household income includes broader income and transfers; average wages describe employed workers. Quarterly values remain at their native frequency and are latest-vintage revised data.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: Household income includes broader income and transfers; average wages describe employed workers. Quarterly values remain at their native frequency and are latest-vintage revised data.
sourceNotes: Statistics Canada; Statistics Canada; Derived from Statistics Canada
